nasb.text: So Moses came and called the elders of the people, and set before them all these words which the Lord had commanded him.

esv.text: So Moses came and called the elders of the people and set before them all these words that the Lord had commanded him.

cnv.text: 摩西去把人民的長老召了來，把耶和華吩咐他的這一切話都擺在他們面前。

ccb.text: 摩西召集以色列的长老，把耶和华对他的一切吩咐都转告他们。
